title: ANOVA Hypothesis Testing Decision Flowchart
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step decision process for conducting and interpreting a One-Way ANOVA test for a semester-end examination scenario, guiding from experimental design to final conclusion.
elements: Collect Exam Score Data from Different Groups
Calculate Summary Statistics (Group Means, Grand Mean)
Make Decision: Reject H₀ or Fail to Reject H₀
If H₀ Rejected: Perform Post-hoc Tests (e.g., Tukey HSD)
relationships: Sequential flow from defining hypotheses to final decision
Branching decision point based on F-statistic comparison leading to conclusion or post-hoc analysis
Data collection feeds into calculation steps
The p-value and critical value comparison determine the path to the final decision
